name: Kingyo Sukui
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>救</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a monster with the same Attribute as the target, add it to your hand, and if you do, shuffle the target into the Deck. Otherwise, send the excavated card to the GY, also destroy this card. You can only use this effect of "Kingyo Sukui" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a monster with the same Attribute as the target, add it to your hand, and if you do, shuffle the target into the Deck. Otherwise, send the excavated card to the GY, also destroy this card. You can only use this effect of "Kingyo Sukui" once per turn.

action: Adds excavated cards to the hand
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
